headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: Rapid-MLX
projects.description: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.
projects.summaryZh: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: omnigent
projects.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.
projects.summaryZh: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: headroom
projects.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
projects.summaryZh: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: ms-swift
projects.description: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).
projects.summaryZh: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025). 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: Daft
projects.description: High-performance data engine for AI and multimodal workloads. Process images, audio, video, and structured data at any scale
projects.summaryZh: High-performance data engine for AI and multimodal workloads. Process images, audio, video, and structured data at any scale 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。

projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: vllm
projects.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
projects.summaryZh: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: gpustack
projects.description: A GPU cluster manager for high-performance AI model serving (vLLM, SGLang) and on-demand SSH-accessible GPU instances.
projects.summaryZh: A GPU cluster manager for high-performance AI model serving (vLLM, SGLang) and on-demand SSH-accessible GPU instances. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
